mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUDIT_LOGS ( actor_type_code, actor_id, action_type_code, target_type_code, target_id, description, ip_address, created_at ) VALUES ( #{actorType}, #{actorId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{actionType}, #{targetType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )

INSERT INTO USER_ACTIVITY_LOG ( user_id, action, result, target_id, detail, client_ip, request_uri, occurred_at ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{action, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clientIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestUri, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )

INSERT INTO ADMIN_ACTIVITY_LOG ( admin_id, action, result, target_id, detail, client_ip, request_uri, occurred_at ) VALUES ( #{adminId}, #{action}, #{result}, #{targetId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clientIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestUri, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )
